feature: Issue ranking (drag-and-rank) + concern disambiguation (free-text → canonical taxonomy) + anonymous aggregate counters with Polis overlay
rationale: Phase 6 introduces a new structured-input UX (drag-rank), a server-side AI-assist endpoint (concern disambiguation), and a server-side aggregate counter (Upstash KV). Expected: issue-ranking components, concern-disambiguation API + UI, canonical issues taxonomy, aggregate-counter API + Polis overlay. Adjacent: Phase 5 chat system prompt needs to consume ranked issues + confirmed concerns; copy-paste prompt generator extends with new structured blocks. NOT expected: changes to Phase 5 budget infrastructure, changes to Phase 4 i18n primitives, changes to Phase 3 data layer (counts API uses zip→county derived from Phase 3 Civic data).
